x.caption:
Private AI vs ChatGPT for business is not a brand debate. It is a workflow decision: what can use a hosted assistant, what needs private retrieval, and what still needs human review.

https://eb28.co/blog/private-ai-vs-chatgpt-for-business-how-to-choose-the-right-workflow-2026-06-16-am/

linkedin.caption:
New EB28 growth brief: Private AI vs ChatGPT for Business: How to Choose

The useful question is not whether a business should use AI. It is which workflows can safely use a hosted assistant, which need private retrieval, and where human review must stay in the loop.

https://eb28.co/blog/private-ai-vs-chatgpt-for-business-how-to-choose-the-right-workflow-2026-06-16-am/

shortFormVideo.hook: Before your team pastes another business document into AI, split workflows into public, private, and human-review lanes.
shortFormVideo.brief: 30-45 second vertical video. Open with three columns on screen: ChatGPT, Private AI, Human Review. Use quick examples: public brainstorming, private SOP/document search, lead follow-up with human approval. End card points to the EB28 guide and richducat@gmail.com.
shortFormVideo.caption: Private AI vs ChatGPT for business starts with data boundaries, not hype.
